ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "active_ingredient" TEXT /* Active ingredient in the drug */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the drug was approved by the FDA */,
  "approved_use" TEXT /* FDA-approved use for the drug on the approval date */,
  "drug_type" TEXT /* Type of the drug (e.g., prescription, over-the-counter, biologic) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the drug is manufactured */,
  "clinical_trial_status" TEXT /* Status of clinical trials */,
  "marketing_status" TEXT /* Current marketing status of the drug */,
  "regulatory_agency" TEXT /* Regulatory agency that approved the drug */,
  "approved_countries" TEXT /* List of countries where the drug is approved */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the drug record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the drug record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the drug record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the drug record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was recorded */,
  "new_approved_use" TEXT /* New approved use or indication for the drug */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of the update (e.g., new indication, safety update) */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "regulatory_agency" TEXT /* Regulatory agency that approved the update */,
  "approved_countries" TEXT /* List of countries where the update is approved */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the update record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the update record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the update record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the update record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_updates_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each drug
